object-entries.description: This writing agent adapts a given text to fit any tone you specify as input.
object-entries.name: Change Tone

object-entries.description: This writing agent acts as an expert linguistic editor, correcting grammar and spelling errors while strictly preserving your original tone and style.
object-entries.name: Fix Spelling and Grammar

object-entries.description: This writing agent improves text eliminating wordiness and passive voice to deliver a clear, direct message.
object-entries.name: Improve Writing

object-entries.description: This agent provides targeted support by searching the Liferay DXP instance for the most relevant data, ensuring every response is grounded in your specific environment.
object-entries.name: Liferay Search

object-entries.description: This writing agent takes a given text and expands it into a longer, more detailed version.
object-entries.name: Make Longer

object-entries.description: This writing agent takes your text and rewrites it to be briefer and easier to read.
object-entries.name: Make Shorter
